title: Do Evangelions think What do Eva pilots synch
display_title: Do Evangelions think What do Eva pilots synch
wikitext:
[]: Do Evangelions "think"? What do Eva pilots synch             Quote Post by V » Fri Dec 07, 2007 12:15 am I am vaguely aware that this was somehow addressed in the manga when Shinji gets absorbed post-Zeruel or something, but that's of course not the same as the anime Evangelions physically have brains, as the skullbusted MP Eva of course showed. Evas are bonded with a human soul. It appears the human soul i.e. Yui, only directly influences actions (voluntary motion) in Berserker mode. ****Do Eva pilots "synch" with the "Nervous system of the physical Eva creature" (the brain)....or do they synch with the mother's soul (we know they do)....or ***a mix of both? Is it essentially that Ritsuko, in episode 23, could easily have gone on to say "and yeah Misato and Shinji, that stuff I always told you about synching with the Eva's nervous system is bullcrap; it synchs with the soul alone" So what do they synchronize with? Beyond that, does the Eva creature itself have a "mind"? Or is it for all intents and purposes braindead? What is it like in the manga? Though it might not be the same for the anime. And what of the MP Evas? They've just got blank Dummy Plugs, which would leave one to think they function purely on the "brain" of the Eva creature......though then again maybe its just basic programming from the dummy plug.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Fri Dec 07, 2007 12:20 am A brain is merely something that sends electrical signals to the muscles. And we know Evas have muscles, so Evas must have brains too. However, the soul is something that science can't define. The soul of the mother probably enters the Eva's brain. I can think of two possible ways for them to "synch." a) The soul of the pilot supplants the soul of the mother, and takes control. b) The soul of the pilot sends messages to the soul of the mother, who controls the Eva as per the child's request. The mother's soul, in either case, would supplant that of the pilot during a berserk to protect her child.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Dec 07, 2007 12:27 am Shiro wrote: A brain is merely something that sends electrical signals to the muscles.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Dec 07, 2007 12:39 am the brain is the control center for the human body, and contains all the info we've ever processed in out entire lives, but how can we explain how we experience thought? this mayb be totally noobish, but i havnt entered that far in Psychology and hell, im only a kid correct me if im wrong

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Fri Dec 07, 2007 12:51 am Well, I suppose I over-simplified it a bit. But that's the basic idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Dec 07, 2007 1:45 am I think the basic premise here is the souls are liked together. In doing so they are, in a sense, sharing the same body. The higher the synch goes the better and worse the effects get.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Dec 07, 2007 3:38 am Shiro, the soul is a very, very physical, scientific concept in NGE, not the magical, mystical thing of theology. How an Eva works, as Reichu put it, is a whole barrel of monkeys. There does appear to be some sort of interface between the Pilot/Dummy System and the Eva's brain/mind/soul- since Shinji thinking in Japanese and Asuka thinking in German stalls the startup of Eva-02. If Kyoko were directly linked to Shinji and Asuka, she shouldn't have had a real problem, since she was bilingual in Japanese and German.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Dec 07, 2007 5:31 am That was the plugs start-up proceedure. The plug isn't part of the Eva so it doesn't count in this instance.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Dec 07, 2007 6:49 am Sadamoto wrote: And just about that time, I was watching the NHK [public TV channel] program "Brain and Heart" and learned about the existence of the A10 nerve, and I told Anno about the idea that popped into my head at that time. That was the idea where "the dead mother is inside the robot, which is operated by mental/psychical bonding with the child.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Dec 07, 2007 7:30 am Too bad none of this crap made into any of the external sources to date...

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Dec 07, 2007 10:19 am V wrote: ****Do Eva pilots "synch" with the "Nervous system of the physical Eva creature" (the brain)....or do they synch with the mother's soul (we know they do)....or ***a mix of both?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Dec 07, 2007 10:48 am LOL, blank dummy plugs. How did that get missed till now? They said KAWORU on them. Zugzwang wrote: The pilots must synchronise with the CNS of the Eva otherwise they wouldn't feel any pain

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Dec 07, 2007 2:19 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Shiro, the soul is a very, very physical, scientific concept in NGE, not the magical, mystical thing of theology.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Dec 07, 2007 2:36 pm The "scientifically defined" part probably is attributed to them (in the show) being able to directly manipulate souls, having the ability to arbitrarily stick them into "containers", and having a scientific branch in a University that, at the very least, deals with souls.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Dec 07, 2007 3:09 pm They are certainly actual things rather than theoretical existences. But I'm just saying the actual scientific data on what they actually are still remains a bit of a mystery. All we really have are "little red dots", "gives life to giant humanoids", "shapes hunks of PWM", "produces ATF", etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Dec 07, 2007 3:40 pm Oh, we (as the viewer) don't have any scientific understanding of how souls work within the show, but within the show itself, there's enough understanding to at least have a branch of biology associated with it.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Dec 07, 2007 3:49 pm We viewers are always kept in the dark... I always get the feeling that Anno is playing the ol' "Pay no attention to the man behind the curtain" trick while we're watching the big flaming head in front of us.... :)

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Dec 07, 2007 10:22 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: LOL, blank dummy plugs. How did that get missed till now? They said KAWORU on them.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Dec 08, 2007 12:03 am V wrote: **** Again, what happened in the manga science in which Shinji is on an internal mindfrak and talks to the soul in the Eva? Its different from the anime I hear.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Dec 08, 2007 7:25 am Ornette wrote: The biggest discrepancy I can remember is when Shinji was trapped in the Eva, there was a third "somebody" with Yui and Shinji and it wanted Shinji to stay.
